title: Parade of the Ewoks

'''"Parade of the Ewoks"''', also known as the '''Ewok theme''', is a musical piece written and composed by [[John Williams]] and performed by the [[London Symphony Orchestra]] for the film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. The complete track was first released as the fourth track on the A-side of the original [[Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi (soundtrack)]] album in 1983. On the 1997 double disc CD release, it is the first track on the second disk. Different variations can be heard several times during the scenes on [[Endor]] and part of it is used during the end credits. The track has a running time of about three minutes and twenty-eight seconds.

The piece was also briefly reprised in the Ewok films: ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' and ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' where it served as [[Wicket Wystri Warrick|Wicket's]] theme. As such it can also briefly be heard on the [[Ewoks (soundtrack)|''Ewoks'' soundtrack]].

In ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'', the music is played when playing as Ewoks.

Similar music is played in the film [[W:c:indianajones:Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade|''Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade'']], which was also scored by John Williams.
